env_blocked_items: SSE presence.subscribe endpoint returns text/plain instead of text/event-stream (environment configuration issue)
prod-cluster-eks shows Error/Disconnected status (no live AWS cluster)

code_bugs.description: tRPC batch request returns 404 for clusters.get,nodes.list,events.list combined batch query on cluster detail page
code_bugs.actual: 404 Not Found - cluster detail data may not load on first visit

code_bugs.description: SSE presence.subscribe returning MIME type text/plain instead of text/event-stream, causing repeated connection aborts every ~60s

phase_1_login_auth.notes: Auth redirect working - /login redirects to dashboard when authenticated. Session persists correctly.

phase_2_dashboard.notes: Stat cards render (Nodes, Pods, Clusters, Warning Events, Anomalies). Cluster Health Matrix, Resource Utilization, Recent Events all present. Card/Table view toggle works. Filters (env, status, provider, health), search, tag filters all functional. Dark/light theme toggle working.

phase_3_cluster_detail.notes: Info header with status badges, k8s version, last seen time. Stats row (Nodes:1, Pods:13/13, Namespaces:6, Version:v1.33). Tabs work (Overview, Nodes, Pods, Services, Deployments, Events). Nodes table shows sortable columns. Recent events list present. Minor: tRPC batch 404 console error.

phase_4_deployments.notes: Page loads with namespace filter and title. No data when no cluster selected in header - expected behavior but could be more informative.

phase_5_logs.notes: Log viewer renders with namespace selector, tail lines selector, Refresh/Pause/Download controls, Live tail checkbox, Auto-scroll, log level filters (ERROR/WARN/INFO/DEBUG), Merged/Split by pod toggle.

phase_6_feature_flags.notes: 3 flags shown with ON/OFF toggles, targeting rules, activity log per flag. Search, status filter, env filter, tag filter all present. Excellent UX.

phase_7_webhooks.notes: Page loads with proper empty state (0 endpoints). Add Webhook CTA visible. Loading skeleton briefly shown then resolved to empty state. Clean UX.

phase_8_teams_permissions.notes: Teams list with 3 teams. Side panel shows team details, member management (add/remove/role change). Permissions page shows Resource Access Viewer and Permission Matrix with user/team role assignments across clusters.

phase_9_audit_log.notes: 14097 entries paginated (705 pages). Sortable timestamp, user, action badge, resource, resource ID, IP address columns. Search, action filter, date range filters present.

phase_10_settings_users.notes: User Management: 2 users with role badges, Promote/Delete actions. Settings: Cluster Connection panel, Platform Info (v0.1.0, API v1, Next.js 16 + tRPC 11, Operational). Tabs for General, AI Configuration, API Tokens, Clusters.

phase_11_add_cluster.notes: Add Cluster wizard opens as modal. Step 1/4 shows provider selection: Kubeconfig, AWS EKS, Azure AKS, Google GKE, Minikube/Local. Progress bar visible. Cancel/Next buttons functional.

phase_12_cross_cutting.notes: Dark/light theme toggle works. Command palette (⌘K) works with navigation shortcuts. Console has 2 recurring errors: tRPC 404 batch, SSE MIME mismatch. Navigation sidebar fully functional with all sections. Version shown (Voyager v0.1.0). Live indicator in header. Breadcrumbs on all pages.

author: mai
